overall.description: A first-person perspective ride on an elevated transit system through a rain-soaked cyberpunk city at night. The camera moves steadily forward past neon-lit buildings and holographic billboards in a futuristic urban environment with heavy atmospheric fog, characteristic of Cyberpunk 2077's Night City.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated transit track through neon district

events.description: flying vehicle passes overhead from left to right through the fog
red neon building exits frame left as transit moves past the district

agents.ego_description: traveling forward on an elevated transit system through the rain-soaked city

entered.detail: low-rise structure bathed in intense red neon light with multiple illuminated windows
tall dark skyscraper with numerous lit windows rising vertically beside the track
large illuminated advertisement screen glowing in the distance through the fog
metal safety barriers lining the sides of the transit pathway

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a foggy cyberpunk night, moving forward on an elevated transit track. A red neon-lit building dominates the left side while a massive dark skyscraper rises on the right. Around 10 seconds, a flying vehicle passes overhead through the mist. The red neon district gradually recedes into the distance as the journey continues toward a glowing digital billboard ahead.

agents.ego_description: maintaining steady forward motion along the elevated railway

entered.detail: metal framework and support structures for the elevated transit system

segments.scene_description: Having left the red neon district behind, the transit continues through the dense urban canyon. The megabuilding on the right gradually shifts to mid-distance as the camera moves parallel to its facade. Industrial scaffolding and support pillars line the left side of the track while the digital billboard ahead grows larger through the persistent rain and fog.

events.description: ambient light increases as the camera approaches the brightly lit billboard and commercial area

agents.ego_description: continuing forward with a slight rightward drift toward the illuminated commercial district

entered.detail: additional illuminated advertisements and store signs visible beyond the main billboard
glowing lights from the street level visible through gaps in the buildings

segments.scene_description: The final segment approaches a brightly lit commercial area, with the digital billboard now looming large in the center view. Having passed the massive tower on the right, the scene opens up to reveal more of the city's depth, with street-level lights and additional signage visible through the rainy haze. The ambient lighting increases as the transit moves closer to the illuminated intersection ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward journey on an elevated transit track that transitions from a moody, red-lit district into a brightly illuminated commercial hub. It begins amidst a heavy fog, gliding past a red neon-lit building on the left and a towering dark skyscraper on the right as a flying vehicle streaks overhead through the mist. As the red glow recedes, the camera moves parallel to the facade of the megabuilding while passing industrial scaffolding and support pillars under a persistent rain. The scene then opens up as the massive tower falls behind, allowing the view to expand toward the city's depth and street-level lights. Finally, the ambient lighting increases as the transit approaches a looming digital billboard and a glowing intersection ahead.
